caption: A man wearing a white face mask, a grey hoodie, and a white baseball cap stands behind a patient who is wrapped in a white floral-patterned sheet. The patient is seated and facing left, while the man stands behind them, seemingly assisting or observing. They are in a clinical setting with a white counter holding various bottles and medical supplies in the background. A QR code is superimposed on the right side of the scene. On the left side of the scene, white text lists "Course content creators, course directors:" followed by names and dates, including "Laura Buchanan, MD 2019- current", "David Gens, MD 2019- current", "Ali Tabatabai, MD 2019-2022", "Mira Ghneim, MD, MS 2019-2021", "Nicole Shockor, MD 2019", "Amanda Chipman, MD 2019-2020", "Olivia Martin, MD, MS 2020-2021", "Ace St John, MD, MS 2021-2022", "Margaret Sundel, MD, MS 2022-2023", and "Matthew D. Cahn, MD 2023". The scene remains static across the frames, with only slight movements in the subjects' positions.
